title: rodgersia aesculifolia
intro: Rodgersia aesculifolia, also known as golden Hakone grass, is a perennial plant native to China and Japan, characterized by its large, dark green leaves and golden-yellow flowers. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rodgersia aesculifolia are thought to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
